queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of negative checking account balances as a credit risk driver contributing to elevated determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical evaluation of the absence of a checking account as a credit risk driver contributing to elevated determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Empirical assessment of loan purposes for used vehicle acquisitions as a mitigating factor in credit risk drivers and determinants of default.
